{{Short description|Men's association football team}}
{{Distinguish|American Samoa men's national football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Samoa women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2024}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name                  = Samoa
| Badge                 = Football Federation Samoa logo (2025).png
| Nickname              = 
| Association           = [[Football Federation Samoa]] (FFS)
| Confederation         = [[Oceania Football Confederation|OFC]] (Oceania)
| Coach                 = [[Jess Ibrom]]
| Captain               = [[Andrew Setefano]]
| Most caps             = [[Andrew Setefano]] (28)
| Top scorer            = [[Desmond Fa'aiuaso]] (9)
| Home Stadium          = [[National Soccer Stadium (Samoa)|National Soccer Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = SAM
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|SAM}}
| FIFA max              = 146
| FIFA max date         = December 2007
| FIFA min              = 204
| FIFA min date         = November 2011
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Samoa}}
| Elo max               = 182
| Elo max date          = 1979
| Elo min               = 224
| Elo min date          = September 2015
| pattern_la1           = 
| pattern_b1            = _lotto_logo_white_detailed
| pattern_ra1           = 
| pattern_sh1           = _lotto_logo_white_right
| pattern_so1           = 
| leftarm1              = 0000FF
| body1                 = 0000FF
| rightarm1             = 0000FF
| shorts1               = 0000FF
| socks1                = 0000FF
| pattern_la2           = 
| pattern_b2            = _SAM_a22
| pattern_ra2           = 
| pattern_sh2           = 
| pattern_so2           = 
| leftarm2              = FFFFFF
| body2                 = FFFFFF
| rightarm2             = FFFFFF
| shorts2               = FFFFFF
| socks2                = FFFFFF
| First game            = {{nowrap|{{fb|SOL}} 12–0 {{fb-rt|SAM|name=Western Samoa}}}} <br /> ([[Suva]], Fiji; 31 August 1979)
| Largest win           = {{fb|SAM}} 10–0 {{Fb-rt|ASA}} <br /> ([[Honiara]], Solomon Islands; 20 November 2023)
| Largest loss          = {{fb|TAH|1946}} 13–0 {{fb-rt|SAM|name=Western Samoa}} <br /> ([[Honiara]], Solomon Islands; 13 July 1981)
| Regional name         = [[OFC Men's Nations Cup|OFC Nations Cup]]
| Regional cup apps     = 3
| Regional cup first    = [[2012 OFC Nations Cup|2012]]
| Regional cup best     = Group stage ([[2012 OFC Nations Cup|2012]], [[2016 OFC Nations Cup|2016]], [[2024 OFC Men's Nations Cup|2024]])
| 2ndRegional name      = [[Football at the Pacific Games|Pacific Games]]
| 2ndRegional cup apps  = 5
| 2ndRegional cup first = [[Football at the 1979 South Pacific Games|1979]]
| 2ndRegional cup best  = Quarter-finals ([[Football at the 1983 South Pacific Games|1983]])
}}
The '''Samoa national football team''' ({{langx|sm|Sāmoa soka au}}) represents [[Samoa]] in men's international [[association football|football]] and is controlled by the [[Football Federation Samoa]], the governing body for football in Samoa. Samoa's home ground is Toleafoa J. S. Blatter Soccer Stadium in [[Apia]]. It was known as the '''Western Samoa''' national football team until 1997.

==History==

===Beginnings (1979–1993)===
Although they had not taken part in the first five editions of the [[South Pacific Games]], their geographical proximity to Fiji, host of [[1979 South Pacific Games]], allowed them to participate for the first time. They lost both group stage matches to [[Wallis and Futuna national football team|Wallis and Futuna]] 3–1 and [[Solomon Islands national football team|Solomon Islands]] 12–0. Four years later, as hosts of the 1983 edition, they beat [[American Samoa national football team|American Samoa]] 3–1, drew 3–3 with [[Tonga national football team|Tonga]] and fell again to [[Wallis and Futuna national football team|Wallis and Futuna]], but the results allowed them to advance to the next round. In the quarterfinals, [[Tahiti national football team|Tahiti]] eliminated them by beating them 2–0.

Samoa entered qualification for the [[Football at the 1988 Summer Olympics|1988 Summer Olympics]] however they were defeated by [[New Zealand men's national football team|New Zealand]] over two legs, losing 7–0 at home before being defeated 12–0 in [[Auckland]]. In the playoffs for the next round, Samoa lost to [[Chinese Taipei national football team|Chinese Taipei]] 5–0 and were eliminated.

===Regional Frustrations (1994–2010)===

In 1994 they hosted the [[1994 Polynesia Cup|first edition]] of the Polynesia Cup, where they beat [[American Samoa national football team|American Samoa]], tied with [[Tonga national football team|Tonga]] and lost to [[Tahiti national football team|Tahiti]] to finish in third position. In 1998 they were third again, coming within a point of the [[Cook Islands national football team|Cook Islands]] in second. Samoa returned to finish third again in the [[2000 Polynesia Cup|2000 edition]] by beating [[Tonga national football team|Tonga]] and [[American Samoa national football team|American Samoa]], but losing to the [[Cook Islands national football team|Cook Islands]] and [[Tahiti national football team|Tahiti]].

After four tournaments absent, they returned in the [[Football at the 2007 South Pacific Games|2007 South Pacific Games]] as hosts. They managed six points by beating [[Tonga national football team|Tonga]] and [[American Samoa national football team|American Samoa]] again, but were eliminated after losing to the [[Solomon Islands national football team|Solomon Islands]] and [[Vanuatu national football team|Vanuatu]].

===OFC Nations Cup (2011–present) ===

In 2011, they hosted the [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification – OFC first round|OFC Nations Cup]] qualifying tournament. There, they beat the [[Cook Islands national football team|Cook Islands]] 3–2, drew 1–1 with [[Tonga national football team|Tonga]] and defeated [[American Samoa national football team|American Samoa]] 1–0 to qualify for the first time in their history. At the championship proper, they were beaten 10–1 by [[Tahiti national football team|Tahiti]], 5–0 by [[Vanuatu national football team|Vanuatu]] and 9–0 by [[New Caledonia national football team|New Caledonia]].

In the [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification – OFC first round|2016 qualifiers]], they beat [[American Samoa national football team|American Samoa]] 3–2 and lost 1–0 to the [[Cook Islands national football team|Cook Islands]]. In their final game, the Samoan team defeated [[Tonga national football team|Tonga]] 3-0 and qualified on goal difference, because of American Samoa's 2–0 win over the Cookian team. At the tournament, which took place in [[Papua New Guinea]], the Samoan team lost 4–0 to [[Tahiti national football team|Tahiti]], 7–0 to [[New Caledonia national football team|New Caledonia]] and 8–0 to the local team. Therefore, they finished in last place in their group without a single point.

During [[2024 OFC Men's Nations Cup qualification|2024 qualifying]], Samoa qualified for the final tournament after a 4-1 win over [[Tonga national football team|Tonga]], and a 1-0 win against [[Cook Islands national football team|Cook Islands]]. Samoa were then eliminated from the [[2024 OFC Men's Nations Cup]] after a 2-0 defeat to [[Tahiti national football team|Tahiti]], a 9-1 defeat against co-hosts [[Fiji national football team|Fiji]], and a 2-1 defeat against [[Papua New Guinea national football team|Papua New Guinea]]; this ensured their elimination as Samoa placed fourth in Group B after conceding thirteen goals without a single point.

==Kit sponsorship==
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:left;"
|-
! Kit supplier<ref>{{cite web |title=Samoa Football Shirts |url=https://www.oldfootballshirts.com/en/teams/s/samoa/old-samoa-football-shirts-t2673.html |website=OldFootballShirts.com |access-date=4 April 2020 |archive-date=30 November 2021 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20211130004902/https://www.oldfootballshirts.com/en/teams/s/samoa/old-samoa-football-shirts-t2673.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
! Period
|-
|align="Left"| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Puma (brand)|Puma]] ||1998
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Italy|2003}} [[Lotto Sport Italia|Lotto]] ||2000
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Admiral Sportswear|Admiral]] ||2001
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Uhlsport]] ||2002
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Italy}} [[Lotto Sport Italia|Lotto]] ||2004
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Uhlsport]] || 2005
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Italy}} [[Lotto Sport Italia|Lotto]] || 2006–2014
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|United States}} [[Nike, Inc|Nike]] ||2015–2016
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[Adidas]] ||2016–2018
|-
|align="left"| FC || 2018
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Italy}} [[Lotto Sport Italia|Lotto]] ||2019–
|}

==Results and fixtures==
{{main|Samoa national football team results|Western Samoa national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

==Coaching staff==
{{Unreferenced section|date=May 2021}}
{| class=wikitable
|-
!style=color:#FFFFFF;background:#0000FF|Position
!style=color:#FFFFFF;background:#0000FF|Name
|-
| Head coach || {{flagicon|NZL}} [[Jess Ibrom (football manager)|Jess Ibrom]]
|-
| Assistant coach || {{flagicon|NZL}} [[Alastair McLae]]
|-
| Goalkeeping coach || {{flagicon|SAM}} [[Joseph Kapisi]]
|-
| Team manager || {{flagicon|SAM}} [[Saolotoga Pula]]
|-
| Technical adviser || {{flagicon|NZL}} [[Jess Ibrom]]
|-
| Gear manager || {{flagicon|SAM}} [[Bevan Kapisi]]
|-
|International Scout || {{flagicon|NZL}} [[Alastair McLae]]
|-
|International Scout || {{flagicon|ENG}} [[Russ Gurr]]
|}

===Coaching history===
{{div col|colwidth=17em}}
*{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Terry Epa]] (1996–2001)
*{{flagicon|ARG}} [[Vic Fernandez]] (2001–2002)
*{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Malo Vaga]] (2002)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[David Brand (football)|David Brand]] (2002/2005)
*{{flagicon|GER}} [[Rudi Gutendorf]] (2003)
*{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Falevi Umutaua]] (2007)
*{{flagicon|ASA}} [[Tunoa Lui]] (2011)
*{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Malo Vaga]] (2012–2014)
*{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Phineas Young (Samoa)|Phineas Young]] (2014–2016)
*{{flagicon|NZL}} [[Scott Easthope]] (2016–2018)
*{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Paul Ualesi]] (2019)
*{{flagicon|NZL}} [[Matt Calcott]] (2021–2022)
*{{flagicon|NIR}} [[Ryan Stewart (football manager)|Ryan Stewart]] (2023–2024)
*{{flagicon|NZL}} [[Jess Ibrom (football manager)|Jess Ibrom]] (2024–present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==
The following players were called up for the [[2024 OFC Men's Nations Cup]].<ref>{{cite web |title=Samoa Squad |url=https://www.friendsoffootballnz.com/2024/06/12/familiar-faces-in-samoa-squad-as-they-prepare-for-ofc-mens-nations-cup/|website=Friends of Football|date=12 June 2024 }}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 22 June 2024, after the game against [[Papua New Guinea national football team|Papua New Guinea]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Joel Bartley]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|4|13|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Sydney United 58 FC|Sydney United]]|clubnat=AUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Paul Taupau]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|1|1|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Franklin United]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Kirk Auvele]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|6|10|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Vaivase-Tai FC|Vaivase-Tai]]|clubnat=SAM}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Andrew Setefano]]|age={{birth date and age|1987|8|10|df=y}}|caps=23|goals=0|club=[[Lupe o le Soaga SC|Lupe o le Soaga]]|clubnat=SAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Faitalia Hamilton-Pama]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1993|5|17}}|caps=9|goals=1|club=[[Western Springs AFC|Western Springs]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Luke Salisbury]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2004|9|15}}|caps=8|goals=1|club=[[Roslyn-Wakari AFC|Roslyn-Wakari]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Luke Tolo-Kent]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2003|4|29}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Miramar Rangers AFC|Miramar Rangers]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Taine Wilson]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2004|11|8}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Nelson Suburbs FC|Nelson Suburbs]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Harry Chote]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|1999|11|4}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Miramar Rangers AFC|Miramar Rangers]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Niko Steinmetz]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2000|4|20}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Western Springs AFC|Western Springs]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dauntae Mariner]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2000|1|25}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[South Island United]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kaleb De Groot-Green]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|5|11|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Christchurch United]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jarvis Vaai|Jarvis Filimalae]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|4|20|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Lupe o le Soaga SC|Lupe o le Soaga]]|clubnat=SAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Alex Malauulu]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|3|12|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Club Atlético San Jorge|San Jorge]]|clubnat=ARG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Caleb Hilbron]]|age={{birth date and age|df=yes|2002|1|1}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Island Bay United]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jesse Vine]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|1|23|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Kemps Creek United FC|Kemps Creek United]]|clubnat=AUS}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Pharrell Trainor]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|6|20|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=2|club=[[TSV Schott Mainz]]|clubnat=GER}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Dilo Tumua]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|3|15|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=3|club=[[Vaivase-Tai FC|Vaivase-Tai]]|clubnat=SAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Michael Tumua Leo]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|1|15|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=5|club=[[Lupe o le Soaga SC|Lupe o le Soaga]]|clubnat=SAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Kyah Cahill]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|3|13|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Free agent|''unattached'']]|clubnat=}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Juan Gobbi]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|11|17|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Free agent|''unattached'']]|clubnat=}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Darcy Knight]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|2|18|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Onehunga Mangere United AFC|Onehunga Mangere United]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Greg Siamoa]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|8|21|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Life FC]]|clubnat=CAM}}
{{nat fs g end}}

===Recent call-ups===
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Key Viliamu]]|age={{birth date and age|1996|8|26|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Lupe o le Soaga SC|Lupe o le Soaga]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jefferson Faamatau]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|7|12|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Vaipuna SC|Vaipuna]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jerrymiah Maiava]]|age={{birth date and age|2000|9|19|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Vaivase-Tai FC|Vaivase-Tai]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Legend Spencer]]|age=|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[FC Minneapolis]]|clubnat=USA|latest=[[Football at the 2023 Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Alman Kwan]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|1|18|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=2|club=[[Vaivase-Tai FC|Vaivase-Tai]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Va'a Taualai]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|6|4|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=2|club=[[Lupe o le Soaga SC|Lupe o le Soaga]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Reupena Fasi]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|1|14|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Goldstar Sogi FC|Goldstar Sogi]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Viliami Viliamu]]|age={{birth date and age|1996|8|26|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Lupe o le Soaga SC|Lupe o le Soaga]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Nathan Viliamu]]|age=|caps=2|goals=2|club=|clubnat=|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Popese Smith]]|age=|caps=1|goals=0|club=|clubnat=|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Falaniko Nanumea]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|1|17|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Vailima Kiwi FC|Vailima Kiwi]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=[[Football at the 2023 Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Darren Talilai]]|age={{birth date and age|1995|10|23|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Lupe o le Soaga SC|Lupe o le Soaga]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=[[Football at the 2023 Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Samuelu Malo]]|age={{birth date and age|1999|4|4|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Vailima Kiwi FC|Vailima Kiwi]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=[[Football at the 2023 Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tuuga Malaeamanu]]|age=|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Adidas SC]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=[[Football at the 2023 Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ethan Stowers]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|10|26|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=1|club=[[Faatoia United FC|Faatoia United]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Xavier Tanielu]]|age={{birth date and age|1999|3|2|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Vaivase-Tai FC|Vaivase-Tai]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Alton Leiataua]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|11|27|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Vaivase-Tai FC|Vaivase-Tai]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ethelbert Edward]]|age={{birth date and age|2007|9|3|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Lepea FC|Lepea]]|clubnat=SAM|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}, 23 March 2024}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{Updated|18 November 2024}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Samoa |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/158/Samoa.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Samoa.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!class="unsortable" style="width:150px;"|Name
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
!class="unsortable" style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|align=left|'''[[Andrew Setefano]]'''
|28
|0
|2011–present 
|-
|2
|align=left|[[Desmond Fa'aiuaso]]
|20
|9
|2001–2016
|-
|rowspan=2|3
|align=left|Filipo Bureta
|14
|0
|2001–2016
|-
|align=left|[[Lionel Taylor (footballer)|Lionel Taylor]]
|14
|1
|2004–2016
|-
|rowspan=4|5
|align=left|[[Junior Michael]]
|13
|5
|1996–2007
|-
|align=left|'''[[Luke Tolo Kent]]'''
|13
|0
|2023–present 
|-
|align=left|'''[[Dauntae Mariner]]'''
|13
|0
|2023–present 
|-
|align=left|'''[[Luke Salisbury]]'''
|13
|2
|2023–present 
|-
|rowspan=3|9
|align=left|[[Silao Malo]]
|12
|2
|2011–2016
|-
|align=left|Jarrell Sale
|12
|0
|2007–2015
|-
|align=left| [[Mike Saofaiga]]
|12
|0
|2011–2019
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{|class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!class="unsortable" width=150px|Name
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
!class="unsortable" width=100px|Career
|-
|1
|align="left"|[[Desmond Fa'aiuaso]]
|9
|20
|{{#expr:9/20 round 2}}
|2001–2016
|-
|rowspan=2|2
|align="left"|'''[[Michael Tumua Leo]]'''
|5
|6
|{{#expr:5/6 round 2}}
|2023–present
|-
|align="left"|[[Junior Michael]]
|5
|13
|{{#expr:5/13 round 2}}
|1996–2007
|-
|4
|align="left"|'''[[Dilo Tumua]]'''
|4
|7
|{{#expr:4/7 round 2}}
|2023–present 
|-
|rowspan=4|5
|align="left"|[[Tama Fasavalu]]
|3
|4
|{{#expr:3/4 round 2}}
|2002–2004
|-
|align="left"| [[Vito Laloata]]
|3
|4
|{{#expr:3/4 round 2}}
|2015–2019
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Nathan Viliamu]]'''
|3
|7
|{{#expr:3/7 round 2}}
|2024–present 
|-
|align="left"|[[Pualele Lemana]]
|3
|11
|{{#expr:3/11 round 2}}
|2001–2004
|-
|}

==Competitive record==

===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan="9"|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
!rowspan="26"|
!colspan="6"|[[FIFA World Cup qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Abbr|W|Won}}
!{{Abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{Abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{Abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Abbr|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Abbr|W|Won}}
!{{Abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{Abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{Abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Abbr|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1986 FIFA World Cup|1986]]
|colspan=8|''Not a FIFA member''
|colspan=6|''Not a FIFA member''
|-
!colspan=9|as '''{{fb|SAM|name=Western Samoa}}'''
!colspan=6|as '''{{fb|SAM|name=Western Samoa}}'''
|-
|{{flagicon|ITA}} [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
!colspan=9|as '''{{fb|SAM}}'''
!colspan=6|as '''{{fb|SAM}}'''
|-
|{{flagicon|FRA|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify''
|2
|1
|0
|1
|2
|2
|-
|{{flagicon|KOR|1997}} {{flagicon|JPN}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|9
|18
|-
|{{flagicon|GER}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|5
|11
|-
|{{flagicon|RSA}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
|4
|2
|0
|2
|9
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
|6
|2
|1
|3
|6
|27
|-
|{{flagicon|RUS}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
|6
|2
|0
|4
|6
|22
|-
|{{flagicon|QAT}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|MEX}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| colspan="8" |''Did not qualify''
|5
|2
|0
|3
|5
|16
|-
|{{flagicon|MAR}} {{flagicon|POR}} {{flagicon|ESP}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
| colspan="8" rowspan="2" |''To be determined''
| colspan="6" rowspan="2" |''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|KSA}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!'''Total'''
!'''–'''
!'''{{Tooltip|0/9|Number of tournaments qualified for}}'''
!'''–'''
!'''–'''
!'''–'''
!'''–'''
!'''–'''
!'''–'''
!'''31'''
!'''11'''
!'''1'''
!'''19'''
!'''42'''
!'''104'''
|}

===OFC Nations Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan="10"|[[OFC Men's Nations Cup|Oceania Cup / OFC Nations Cup]] record
!rowspan="2"|
!colspan="6"|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Abbr|W|Won}}
!{{Abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{Abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{Abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Abbr|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
!colspan=17|as {{fb|SAM|name=Western Samoa}}
|-
|{{flagicon|New Zealand}} [[1973 OFC Nations Cup|1973]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''
!rowspan=3|
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|New Caledonia|french}} [[1980 OFC Nations Cup|1980]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Pacific Community}} [[1996 OFC Nations Cup|1996]]
|colspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|3
|1
|1
|1
|5
|10
|-
!colspan=17|as {{fb|SAM}}
|-
|{{flagicon|AUS}} [[1998 OFC Nations Cup|1998]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Did not qualify''
!rowspan=10|
|4
|2
|0
|2
|8
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|TAH}} [[2000 OFC Nations Cup|2000]]
|4
|2
|0
|2
|13
|6
|-
|{{flagicon|NZL}} [[2002 OFC Nations Cup|2002]]
|4
|2
|0
|2
|8
|9
|-
|{{flagicon|AUS}} [[2004 OFC Nations Cup|2004]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|5
|11
|-
|{{flagicon|Pacific Community}} [[2008 OFC Nations Cup|2008]]
|4
|2
|0
|2
|9
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|SOL}} [[2012 OFC Nations Cup|2012]]
| rowspan="3" |Group stage
|8th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|1
|24
|[[2012 OFC Nations Cup squads#Samoa|Squad]]
|3
|2
|1
|0
|5
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|PNG}} [[2016 OFC Nations Cup|2016]]
|8th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|0
|19
|[[2016 OFC Nations Cup squads#Samoa|Squad]]
|3
|2
|0
|1
|6
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|FIJ}} {{flagicon|VAN}} [[2024 OFC Men's Nations Cup|2024]]
|7th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|2
|13
|[[2024 OFC Men's Nations Cup squads#Samoa|Squad]]
|2
|2
|0
|0
|5
|1
|-
!Total
!Group stage
!3/11
!9
!0
!0
!9
!3
!56
!—
!31
!16
!2
!13
!64
!58
|}

===Pacific Games===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|-
!colspan=9|[[Pacific Games]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Fiji|colonial}} [[Football at the 1963 South Pacific Games|1963]]
|rowspan=5 colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|NCL|french}} [[Football at the 1966 South Pacific Games|1966]]
|-
|{{flagicon|PNG|1965}} [[Football at the 1969 South Pacific Games|1969]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TAH|1946}} [[Football at the 1971 South Pacific Games|1971]]
|-
|{{flagicon|GUM}} [[Football at the 1975 South Pacific Games|1975]]
|-
|{{flagicon|FIJ}} [[Football at the 1979 South Pacific Games|1979]]
|Group stage
|10th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|3
|19
|-
|style="border: 3px solid red"|{{flagicon|WSM}} [[Football at the 1983 South Pacific Games|1983]]
|Quarter-finals
|6th
|4
|1
|1
|2
|7
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|NCL|french}} [[Football at the 1987 South Pacific Games|1987]]
|rowspan=4 colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|PNG}} [[Football at the 1991 South Pacific Games|1991]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TAH}} [[Football at the 1995 South Pacific Games|1995]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Fiji}} [[Football at the 2003 South Pacific Games|2003]]
|-
|style="border: 3px solid red"|{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Football at the 2007 South Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2007]]
|Group stage
|5th
|4
|2
|0
|2
|9
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|NCL|football}} [[Men's Football at the 2011 Pacific Games|2011]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|PNG}} [[Men's Football at the 2015 Pacific Games|2015]]
|colspan=8|''N/A – tournament was U23''
|-
|style="border: 3px solid red"|{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Football at the 2019 Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2019]]
|Group stage
|8th
|4
|1
|0
|3
|3
|22
|-
|-
|{{flagicon|SOL}} [[Football at the 2019 Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2023]]
|Group stage
|7th
|4
|2
|0
|2
|14
|3
|-
!'''Total'''
!'''Quarter-finals'''
!'''5/16'''
!19
!6
!1
!12
!36
!60
|}

==Head-to-head record==
''As of 15 November 2024''<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.eloratings.net/Samoa|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Samoa|publisher=Elo Ratings|access-date=30 July 2017|archive-date=20 January 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180120183113/http://www.eloratings.net/Samoa.htm|url-status=live}}</ref>

{{#invoke:sports table|main|style=WDL
|show_positions=n
|ranking_style=wperc
|show_totals=yes
|sortable_table=yes

|team1=ASA|name_ASA={{fb|ASA}}
|team2=AUS|name_AUS={{fb|AUS}}
|team3=TPE|name_TPE={{fb|TPE}}
|team4=COK|name_COK={{fb|COK}}
|team5=FIJ|name_FIJ={{fb|FIJ}}
|team6=GUM|name_GUM={{fb|GUM}}
|team7=NCL|name_NCL={{fb|NCL}}
|team8=NZL|name_NZL={{fb|NZL}}
|team9=PNG|name_PNG={{fb|PNG}}
|team10=SOL|name_SOL={{fb|SOL}}
|team11=TAH|name_TAH={{fb|TAH}}
|team12=TGA|name_TGA={{fb|TGA}}
|team13=TUV|name_TUV={{fb|TUV}}
|team14=VAN|name_VAN={{fb|VAN}}
|team15=WAF|name_WAF={{fb|WAF|local}}

|win_ASA=12|draw_ASA=0|loss_ASA=0|gf_ASA=56|ga_ASA=5
|win_AUS=0 |draw_AUS=0|loss_AUS=1|gf_AUS=0 |ga_AUS=11
|win_TPE=0 |draw_TPE=0|loss_TPE=1|gf_TPE=0 |ga_TPE=5
|win_COK=3 |draw_COK=1|loss_COK=3|gf_COK=9 |ga_COK=9
|win_FIJ=0 |draw_FIJ=0|loss_FIJ=6|gf_FIJ=3 |ga_FIJ=31
|win_GUM=0 |draw_GUM=0|loss_GUM=1|gf_GUM=2 |ga_GUM=4
|win_NCL=0 |draw_NCL=0|loss_NCL=4|gf_NCL=0 |ga_NCL=29
|win_NZL=0 |draw_NZL=0|loss_NZL=2|gf_NZL=0 |ga_NZL=19
|win_PNG=0 |draw_PNG=0|loss_PNG=6|gf_PNG=5 |ga_PNG=28
|win_SOL=0 |draw_SOL=0|loss_SOL=4|gf_SOL=0 |ga_SOL=21
|win_TAH=0 |draw_TAH=0|loss_TAH=10|gf_TAH=4 |ga_TAH=50
|win_TGA=8 |draw_TGA=3|loss_TGA=2|gf_TGA=27|ga_TGA=11
|win_TUV=0 |draw_TUV=0|loss_TUV=1|gf_TUV=0 |ga_TUV=3
|win_VAN=0 |draw_VAN=0|loss_VAN=6|gf_VAN=2 |ga_VAN=40
|win_WAF=0 |draw_WAF=0|loss_WAF=2|gf_WAF=2 |ga_WAF=5

|update=complete|source=[[Western Samoa national football team results#Results|1979–97 results]] and [[Samoa national football team results#Results|1998–present results]]
}}
<small>Includes results as Western Samoa.</small>

==Historical kits==

{{Empty section|date=July 2024}}

==References==
{{reflist}}

==External links==
{{commonscat}}
* [https://www.oceaniafootball.com/samoa/ Samoa] at [[Oceania Football Confederation|OFC]]
* [https://www.fifa.com/about-fifa/associations/SAM Samoa] at [[FIFA]]

{{Football in Samoa}}
{{OFC teams}}
{{National sports teams of Samoa}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Samoa National Football Team}}
[[Category:Samoa national football team| ]]
[[Category:Samoa men's national football teams| ]]
[[Category:Oceanian national association football teams]]
